---
title: Fall 2025 Course Schedule
page-layout: full
repo-actions: false
---

<!--This is my personal clarity, please delete or replace with your own clarity-->
{{< include /files/includes/_msclarity.qmd >}}

| Week | Date | Lecture | Guest Speaker | Assignment |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | 8/25 | Introduction: Grand challenges |  |  |
| 2 | 9/1 | Labor Day - No session |  |  |
| 3 | 9/8 | Make sense of energy and climate numbers | [Dr. Mallory Flowers](https://drganghe.github.io/climate-guest-speakers/speakers/mallory-flowers/index.html) |  |
| 4 | 9/15 | Climate impact and responses |  |  |
| 5 | 9/22 | No class schedule |  |  |
| 6 | 9/29 | Energy systems overview |  |  |
| 7 | 10/6 | Energy sources |  |  |
| 8 | 10/14 | Energy demand, energy and economy |  |  |
| 9 | 10/24 | Energy, environment, and health |  |  |
| 10 | 10/27 | Energy systems approach | [Dr. Beia Spiller](https://drganghe.github.io/climate-guest-speakers/speakers/beia-spiller/index.html) |  |
| 11 | 11/3 | Energy transition |  |  |
| 12 | 11/10 | Human behavior, culture, and sustainable energy consumption |  |  |
| 13 | 11/17 | Climate policy instruments |  |  |
| 14 | 11/24 | Big data and AI for climate change  |  |  |
| 15 | 12/1 | Uncertainties in policy analysis |  |  |
| 16 | 12/8 | Presentation |  |  |

: {.striped .responsive}

Note: PR--Policy Response, HW--Homework Assignment, PM--Policy Memo
